title: well_validate_vitality (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `well_validate_vitality`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing well schema for `well_validate_vitality` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Validate that vitality signals do not become identity freezing.

vitality_symbolic_load.description: §14 MEDIUM — Vitality validation has social weight.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every well_validate_vitality output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
